result.stdout:
cmdui - Blazor Server web UI for CommandsFramework CLI tools

Usage:
  cmdui <toolname>    Launch UI for a specific tool
  cmdui              Discover all installed CommandsFramework tools

Examples:
  cmdui slnutil
  cmdui azdoutil
